_meta.method: S1/S2-all430 deterministic + live Wikidata re-retrieval; S2/S3 40-card non-Wikidata sample; S4 122-card boundary non-Wikidata; S6 signed-record integrity + citation resolution

verdictSummary.note: Fail-closed. RED=>dropped; AMBER=>owner list; 2+ AMBER facts on one card=>RED (none reached 2).

cards.reason: S4 bucket-crossing with cited-override. Override anchors era at 1996 (Monaco, 'premier match en professionnel fevrier 1996', S6-verified) calling 1994 a squad-registration year. BUT Wikipedia shows a 1994 FIRST-TEAM professional debut for Platense (Argentina, '12 June 1994 as a 16-year-old'), i.e. earliest senior CLUB career = 1994 (era1). The override premise (1994=squad-registration) is contradicted by a 1994 Platense senior debut. Not RED (signed editorial + resolving citation for the 1996 Monaco debut) but owner should review whether the era should follow the Platense senior start.

S4 borderline cut case. Card eraYear 2005 is faithful to WD P54 (Rio Ave membership start 2005; NOT a clamp - born+16=2004<2005). Wikipedia says he joined Rio Ave in 2004 (age 16), first-team Primeira Liga the following season. 1-year WD-vs-Wikipedia join-vs-first-team difference straddling the 2004/05 cut (era2 vs era3). Not RED (card faithful to the P54 membership-start rule); owner note.

S2/S3 sample: PRINTED club chip 'San Lorenzo de Almagro' is FALSE. Two non-Wikidata sources disconfirm - Wikipedia career table (Atletico Nacional 2005-08, Nice, Arsenal, Napoli, Al Nassr, Atletico Nacional 2024-26) and Transfermarkt contain NO San Lorenzo spell; it is not even top-3 by tenure. New F2-class instance (well-formed but false WD P54) on a printed chip, NOT covered by any ownerDisputedStatements record. Napoli, Atletico Nacional, GK, Colombia all confirmed; eraYear cited-override (2006, Atletico Nacional, S6-verified). Recommend Benatia-class disposition: drop the San Lorenzo chip, refill by tenure (Nice/Arsenal), add a disputed-statement record. One amber fact -> AMBER, not RED.

clampObservations.reason: S4 crossing is a CLAMP RULE-OUTPUT, not an anomaly: sourceStartYear 2003 = born+16 (1987+16) clamp of a sub-16 youth membership (WD P54 earliest = 1999, age 12). Non-WD senior debut is 2006 (Vitoria). Per ticket clamp carve-out this is a correct rule output; era2 is a faithful clamp result. OWNER-OBSERVATION (Falcao-class clamp side-effect): senior career is era3.

S4 crossing is a CLAMP/YOUTH RULE-OUTPUT: sourceStartYear 2004 = born+16 (1988+16) of a 2004 YOUTH-squad membership (Pao de Acucar, Wikipedia: 'joining the youth squad in 2004'). Senior career 2006 (FC Vilnius). Correct rule output; OWNER-OBSERVATION (Falcao/youth-clamp class): senior career is era3.

S1_structural.summary: 0 violations across cardId/QID uniqueness, clubs.length, displayCode, eraIndex recompute, eraYear rule, age-16 clamp.

nameSpelling.note: 24 card vs live-WD-label differences; ZERO card errors. Editorial common/full-name, diacritic normalization (card more correct), and live-WD VANDALISM the card is immune to (e.g. 'Romelu Lukaku LA CAKA', Xabi Alonso->'Carasu', 'Joao Moutinh0', Greek-alpha 'Arda Guler', 'Medhi Benatia').

allCards_wikidata.note: Every printed club chip on all 430 cards re-retrieved live from Wikidata P54; 0 missing.

sample40_nonWikidata.note: 40-card seeded sample; each printed chip additionally confirmed against a non-Wikidata source with verbatim citation. One false chip found: real_0365 Ospina/San Lorenzo (see AMBER).

disclosures: SCOPE: ticket named 4 owner files (positionRulings, disputedStatements, citedOverrides, eraRestores) + 'all five record types'. The commit actually carries 6 owner files (also ownerNationRulings, ownerDebutRulings); all 6 were verified. The 'five' phrasing is treated as an approximation; Busquets cited debut lives in ownerDebutRulings (verified).
METHOD: S1 + S2(all-430) were machine-verified against a fresh live Wikidata wbgetentities retrieval (2026-07-17, 430 QIDs, 0 missing) - deterministic re-retrieval, not from memory.

S6 citation for Arda Turan: live galatasaray.org failed WebFetch TLS certificate verification; the exact quoted sentence was re-resolved via the archive.org snapshot 2025-04-27 (URL recorded). All other 9 named/override citations resolved on the live URL.

S4 boundary rule chosen: |eraYear - cut| <= 2 with cuts at 1975.5 / 1994.5 / 2004.5 (midpoint of each adjacent eraYearMax/eraYearMin pair) -> 122 cards. A wider +-2-of-each-endpoint reading would add a few cards; the midpoint reading is documented and complete within itself (0 unreachable).

LIVE-WIKIDATA VANDALISM observed during retrieval (labels only; does not affect card correctness, which uses canonical names): Q-labels for Lukaku, Xabi Alonso, Moutinho, Arda Guler, Benatia were vandalized/erroneous at fetch time.

The 40-card sample used non-Wikidata sources that were frequently English Wikipedia (which the owner records themselves treat as a valid non-Wikidata source, e.g. van der Sar/De Bruyne). Where a stronger independent source (Transfermarkt/official) was used it is cited; all citations carry a verbatim quote + resolvable URL.

Workflow research: 162 agents, 0 errors, 0 empty results; every S4/S2/S3 outcome (agreement and disagreement) carries publisher+URL+verbatim quote at write time per the harness rule. No agent report was acted on before its structured text was physically present in the returned result.
